import React from 'react'; const AboutPage = () => { return (

About the AI Fitness & Prediction System

This system represents a major project bridging web development (MERN stack) with **specialized Machine Learning services (Python/Flask)** to deliver a highly predictive and personalized health management platform. Our goal is to move beyond simple calorie counting toward **proactive health risk mitigation.**

{/* --- Core Modules --- */}

System Intelligence & Feature Breakdown

{/* 1. Health Risk Prediction (UPDATED) */}

1. Advanced Predictive Health Risk Diagnosis

The core AI module uses a **Random Forest Classifier** trained on 11+ features, including advanced lifestyle factors like **Water Intake, Vegetable Servings, and Processed Meat Frequency**. It assesses the probability of **Obesity and Metabolic Risk** (Low/Medium/High).

Tech Stack: Python/Flask, scikit-learn, Advanced Feature Engineering.

{/* 2. Calorie Estimation */}

2. Image-Based Calorie Estimation (Simulated DL)

This module simulates the output of a **Deep Learning Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)** for classifying food images and estimating portion sizes against a local nutritional database. This automates the daily logging of calorie and macro intake.

Tech Stack: Python/Flask, CNN (Simulated), Nutritional Lookup Data.

{/* 3. Recommendation Engine (UPDATED) */}

3. Goal-Driven Personalization & Gamification

The Node.js backend uses a **Rule-Based Recommendation Algorithm** to synthesize all user data (TDEE, Goal, Risk Score) into precise **Daily Calorie Targets**, customized macro goals, and workout plans. It includes a **Daily Streak** system to encourage consistency and adherence.

Tech Stack: Node.js/Express.js, Rule-Based Logic, Gamification Logic.

{/* --- Architecture --- */}

System Architecture: MERN + Python Microservices

The project utilizes a modular **Microservices Architecture** to ensure high performance and scalability by separating the web application logic from compute-intensive tasks.

  • **Frontend (Tier 3):** React (User Interface, Data Visualization, Routing)
  • **Backend (Tier 2):** Node.js/Express.js (API Gateway, Authentication, Business Logic)
  • **Database (Tier 1):** MongoDB/Mock DB (Data Storage, Logs, Profiles)
  • **External ML (Tier 1):** Python/Flask Services (Prediction and Estimation)
); }; export default AboutPage;
